title: Inside India newsletter: Meet the humans teaching robots to perform routine tasks, as India finds a way to enter the AI race
summary_full: Several companies have cropped up in India providing video training data made by humans that is being used to teach robots in the U.S. and China.
summary_public: Several companies have cropped up in India providing video training data made by humans that is being used to teach robots in the U.S. and China.
